# OpenClaw Enhancement & Compatibility Kit

Primary index for LLMs and agents.

- `README.md`: product overview and installation story
- `README_CN.md`: Chinese overview
- `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`: architecture and layer model
- `docs/MIGRATION.md`: migration guide from the legacy skills repo
- `docs/AUDIT.md`: repository audit and mismatch summary
- `metadata/canonical.json`: canonical source of truth for skills, adapters, modes, and distribution
- `oeck/runtime_core/`: policy, context, memory, session, sandbox, tracing, workspace resolution
- `oeck/adapters/`: distribution and optional enhancement adapters
- `skills/`: content assets preserved for compatibility
- `.openclaw/checks/`: markdown-based validation rules
- `tools/sync_repo_state.py`: generates manifests and README sections
- `tools/run_checks.py`: executes shared checks
- `tools/post_edit_validate.py`: post-edit validation pipeline
- `tools/repo_map.py`: repo map and codebase summary
- `tools/smoke_test.py`: local smoke test
